name: TriptoVR - Travel The World, Explore and Relax

reviews.review_description:
As per title.  There is a massive chunk of the world missing.  I would have loved to have seen India, Pakistan, Uzbekistan, Nepal etc  A lot more of China.  Russia, Central America like Belize, Guatamala, Honduras etc.

A lot of the locations are very condensed around Europe.

Still loads of videos and good quality videos.  Really fantastic.  Narration can be a bit boring but I will take boring over annoying any day.

I really think the score for this app is a bit mean.  For what content is there (and there is a lot), it is really amazing.  No way I can give it less than full marks.  I hope they are still actively making content and make more videos in new areas.  It's a beautiful compilation of 3D travel shows.

developer_response.body:
Hi Phuzion1,

Thank your for your support and feedback. You'll be happy to know we are actively adding new destinations every week. ( in fact we have already added 2 episodes in India and Hong Kong and Shanghai is coming soon)

While our initial library naturally grew around Europe, our goal is to capture the entire globe.  Our teams are constantly on the move to bring more of Asia, Central America, and beyond to TriptoVR

We also took your note on the narration to heart. We always aim for an informative, relaxed vibe, but we’ll make sure to keep finding that right balance so it stays engaging😉. Did you know that if you want you can also turn of the narration (under audio)

Thank you for exploring the world with us, and keep an eye out for those new horizons dropping every week!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
This reminds me of the old Arnold movie "Total Recall" where they had the technology to implant vacations into your mind without actually having to go there and deal with the expense and hassles.   
I had always wished that technology was real because unfortunately I will never be able to get to travel.
With this app I can actually 'visit' all these exotic places across the globe.  The videos feel ultra-realisitic as if I am there along with a handy travel guide describing what I am looking at.
Congrats to the team that built this amazing app and I will look forward to visiting more destinations in the future!

developer_response.body:
Hi Giants316,

Thank you for your support. Reading feedback like this means a lot to us, because it's one of the main reasons we built, and continue to develop, TriptoVR: to make travel experiences accessible to everyone, regardless of limitations in time, budget, or physical ability to travel.

We’re committed to continuously improving the platform and adding new destinations every week, so there will always be more of the world to discover.

Thank you for being part of this journey with us!

Best regards,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
I paid monthly and used this app for 4 months, and downloaded the places I visited and the ones on my bucket list. I wrote a great review, but I just went on the app and all my downloads are gone now!! 😡
Tried to get a hold of the company, but that seemed impossible. 
Very disappointed 😕

developer_response.body:
Hi Scooby,


Thank you for contacting us. And how unfortunate that this has happened to you yesterday. We are actively working to see what is the cause of your issue.

Update 2: We have now confirmed that it is not something that could be caused by an update or the app itself.  (after doing a crosschecks over older builds, logs and codechecks)

So the issue does not seem to be in the latest update nor in the app itself. So there is probably another reason why this happened.

 Are you on your own Meta and subscribed account? Are you still actively subscribed? (You would lose access if you are not) . You did not clean up the appdata of the device or anything? Or maybe an update of your quest software caused a reset of your app-data? On what Quest device are you exactly? Any more info you can provide can help pin this down. Thank you!

For now as long as you are subscribed you have acces to all destinations and you can download them again. ( but we understand the time you invested in downloading before)

Could you tell us if this happened after the last update? ( done yesterday) We have made some changes in the startup of the app, maybe that is causing this issue for you. 

You can contact us at info@triptovr.com or info@vr-gorilla.( it is also in the apps contact adress) Please send us an email so we can work this out for you asap and you can start enjoying the app again.

Best

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
It was like I was really there. I loved the fact that it was truly immersive and I could look around 360 degrees. The commentary was clear and informative 
At the moment, I’ve only downloaded the 2 free places (Venice and Santiago), but I will download others. 
The price for places is very reasonable and a fraction of the price of an in-person guided tour. 
My only criticism is that the transition to other places within the tour was a little swift and therefore could be dizzying, but this is a minor criticism. 
This is a real chance to “visit” places I’m unlikely to travel to.

developer_response.body:
Hi SuWinter,

Thank you so much for your support! Hearing that it felt like you were "really there" is exactly why we do this. You hit the nail on the head regarding the value: our dream as TriptoVR is to make the world accessible to everyone, and providing travel experiences at a fraction of the cost of a physical trip is a big part of that mission.

We also appreciate your honest feedback. We want the experience to be as comfortable as possible, so we will keep improving where we can.

Enjoy your future travels with TriptoVR from the comfort of your home! 🌍

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: I chose to subscribe to get the most out of viewing places that I will likely never get to see any time soon. So most locations are amazing, while others a little less clear, although it could be my end. I haven’t tried any the download options just streamed. I don’t see any updates of new places in notifications and think I’ve done some repeat visits but just as enjoyable the second time. Thank you to the creators for the experiences.😊

developer_response.body:
Hi Mecs,

Thank you for your support, and great to hear you’re enjoying TriptoVR!

For the best viewing quality, we recommend downloading episodes. When streaming, the quality depends on your internet connection. If the connection is weaker, the app will automatically lower the quality to ensure smooth playback.

As for new experiences, we add new destinations every week (last week it was Zanzibar), and we send out notifications when new content is available. We’re also currently working on an update that will make it easier to discover the newest episodes directly in the app, so hope that helps!

Thanks for travelling with us :-)

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: I’m really glad I found this app. Being able to see different places and learn about different cultures is awesome. Being able to pause and look around makes me feel like I am at the location.

developer_response.body:
Hi Hi Fortworth86,

Thank you so much for your kind review! We’re really happy to hear that you’re enjoying TriptoVR and that the subscription feels worth it. That feeling of being able to really experience a place is exactly what we’re trying to create.

We’ll keep adding new destinations and cultural experiences, so there’s much more to explore. Thanks again for your support!

Best,

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: I love trip to vr so much I’m on it most of the time just one things a lot of places missing

I tried this app once and I was floating above the ground. Everything is at a very extreme height. And this is not good for someone who is uncomfortable with heights. How can it be improved? I believe all the settings are correct on my Meta Quest 3 headset so it must be something in how the scenes are created. Please advise.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jennifer,

Thank you for your feedback, It is a bit unclear what you mean with extreme height. Most of the destinations are filmed from the ground at eye-level height. Are you referring to the occasional drone shot or is it something else that is happening.  We would like to better understand it. You can let us know here or you can send us a message at info@triptovr.com. Thank you!

Best Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_title: Great VR App, But Needs More Global spot
reviews.review_description:
Triptovr on the Meta Quest 3 is a very impressive virtual travel app, with a great selection of destinations, especially around Europe. The historic sites, landmarks, and cultural locations feel immersive, and the added stories give each place meaningful context.

The global coverage still feels limited though. Asia is noticeably underrepresented, and it would be great to see major locations like the Great Wall of China, Boracay or Palawan in the Philippines, Singapore, and other iconic Asian destinations added in the future.

Some places also seem to have been captured during less‑than‑ideal weather, with cloudy skies or off‑season conditions. It would help if the app mentioned the season or time of year the footage was taken, so viewers know what to expect and can plan the best time to visit in person.

Another limitation is the globe interface, which only rotates left and right. Because of this, regions like Australia do not appear at all, making the world feel incomplete.

Overall, Triptovr is a fantastic VR travel experience with huge potential. With more Asian destinations, clearer seasonal context, and a more flexible globe interface, it could become the ultimate virtual travel app.👏👏👏

developer_response.body:
Hi Mstrwnshr,

Thank you so much for your support and detailed feedback.

You'll be happy to know that we are actively adding new destinations every week. There will also be a menu updated in about a month which will make it clearer which destinations have been added latest. It is our goal to fill up the globe on every continent.

Yes sometimes the weather get's in our way, it is hard to plan for even in the right season. We would love to shoot with sunshine every time,  but will consider your idea to add it as info.

The globe actually turn up an down too, so you can reach Australia or Iceland, but you have to use your left controller for that. In the next update we will add this movement to the right controller so it is clearer.

Thank you for being part of the journey!

Best,

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: I’m obsessed with this app! I love it so much. I love how it feels like I’m right there!

developer_response.body:
Hi Poppubug2,

Thank you for your support! And great to hear you love it. That feeling of being there is exactly what we are aiming for :-) There are many more great destinations coming up, so stay tuned and thank you for being part of the journey!

Best, Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: My wife has dementia. I’m always looking for ways to get her to engage her surroundings again. This app lets her explore forests, meet wild animals on safari, and visit famous landmarks ON HER COUCH.  Well done. Da bomm dot com.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Neonsealion, This is so inspiring to hear and one of the reasons we created TriptoVR, to give people that sense of travelling from home.  One question though, the meta system flagged this beautiful review and even removed it. (unbelievable) Would you be so kind to send it in again so people can actually read it and it can hopefully help more people in the same situation? ( maybe without  the da bomm dot com, it might have triggered something in their system?). Thank you so much! Best Peter from Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: This is basically nothing more than a set of 360 pics taken in various locations for each destination, with some added narration about the location. It isn’t bad per se, I just expected being able to at least “walk around” a bit while visiting each location - all you can do is rotate from where camera was placed.

developer_response.body:
Hi Oza804, thank you for your feedback!
To clarify, the experiences are VR/360° 3D videos(not pics) that transport you to the destination. Because they are moving/videos, for most users, they are more immersive than still pictures and feel closer to experiencing the real thing.

Your idea is interesting; however, at the moment, it isn’t technically possible to freely walk inside a video, which is why you’re taken on a guided tour. Right now we are focused on adding as many destinations as possible to the globe, so there is lots to experience.  That said, we have been thinking of adding a feature like that, in the future, so users can choose between watching the  VR video or exploring the location through a photo-based or animated walkthrough. So to be continued. :-) 

Update: Ps would you be so kind to change the word "pics" into "videos" as in many languages pics is translated to photo, which is not what the app contains, and might give users the wrong idea.


Thank you and best!

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
Fun game easy for other to join in intense action.
Have plenty of room to play. Zombies  are there
Plenty of actions.

reviews.review_title: You have to pay for it
reviews.review_description: Edit- it’s not ai if you think it is it’s pretty realistic to what it shows on the photos. EVEN THO you have to pay for it you do have to think you have to get money off it somehow

developer_response.body:
Hi Theroyalemonkey.

Update: Thank you,  Theroyalemonkey, we appreciate it that you have updated your review. Nice to hear you are enjoying the free offerings! 

There is NO ai generated content in TriptoVR. All episodes are filmed on real locations around the world with real VR camera crews. Producing and creating these episodes is time consuming and expensive. To make our app sustainable and being able to add new episodes from around the world every week  we need a sustainable businenessmodel, which is why it is not completely free. However you can try the free episodes and free trial which gives you access to all content.

Best,

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: Finally I'm moving and it is fun to do......62 yrs old and finally. I love it

I love this app! I’ve visited nearly 100 places—most of which I’ll probably never see in person. Not only does it let you explore and learn about different areas, but you also get a glimpse into the everyday lives of the people who live there, which is something you just don’t get with other apps.

It really appeals to the people-watcher in me. If you visit the same locations more than once, you can even play a little game I like to call “Find the Photographer.” Sometimes you never spot them, sometimes you see them all the time—and if you pay close attention, you might even notice relationships forming and a family growing right before your eyes .
I have only one complaint. I wish the menu button on the controller activated menu button in the app.

developer_response.body:
Hi Hawking66,

Thank you for your wonderful review! It’s amazing to hear you’ve already explored nearly 100 places with us. We love that the app gives you a glimpse into the everyday lives of people across the globe and makes you feel connected.

Regarding the menu button: thank you for that specific feedback. We are always looking for ways to make the interface more intuitive, and we will certainly look into mapping the controller's menu button for easier navigation in a future update.

We add new destinations every single week, so there will always be something new for you to discover, so stay tuned!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: I find myself very relaxed, even after a stressful  day. Thanks for the downtime

developer_response.body:
Hi WendellG,

That is wonderful to hear! And one of the reasons we are so motivated in making TriptoVR a succes. We also feel that that mini-vacation feeling is a welcome break in a time where everything is moving so fast. Knowing that we can provide you with that bit of downtime is a big motivation for us :-). Our teams are out there every week capturing new corners of the globe to make sure you always have a fresh place to find some peace.

Thanks for traveling with us! 🌍

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: Freezes constantly. I have rebooted the headset several times. Uninstallerd and reinstalled the app, and now it keeps cutting off and going to my home screen. So aggravating.

developer_response.body:
Hi sassylass, thank you for your feedback, sorry to hear that. Not something we have heard before from other users.

 Is the headset itself up to date. Have you tried updating the app, or completely removing the app data? If it freezes up, are you streaming? Then this could be a network issue, streaming requires a fast internet connection. Or have you downloaded the videos? We'd love to hear more about the issue. If you could share more info and maybe a screen recording to info@triptovr.com we can further assist you and see if we can pinpoint the issue. With your feedback we can further improve and tackle issues like this. Thank you and best! Team TriptoVR

developer_response.body:
Hi LadyGrimm, Thank you for the support!  We love that "traveling" has a whole new meaning in your house now! It’s the best way to beat a commute😊

We’re definitely not slowing down, we’re out there every week capturing new corners of the globe to make sure your living room stays the ultimate gateway.😆

Thanks for being part of the TriptoVR journey!

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
$10 a month subscription?? 🤣
Yeah..ok....Uninstalling.

developer_response.body:
Hi JN2112,

There are 2 free episodes in the app, and there is a 7-day free trial, which unlocks all destinations, so everyone can enjoy TriptoVR if you are open to it.

The reason behind the month price tag is that TriptoVR isn't a platform for user-uploaded videos or basic 360° clips. Our own professional international production teams are constantly traveling the world, filming, and producing exclusive 3D VR content from scratch.  And we upload a new episode every week. This is time-consuming and expensive, and without our subscribers, we would not be able to make this happen. Our goal is to let everybody explore the globe and experience travel experiences for just a tiny fraction of the cost of an actual trip. 

We appreciate you giving the app a look anyway, and we wish you many great VR adventures ahead!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: This app not free and not available demo

developer_response.body:
Hi Nithisboy,

The app is free to download, has 2 free destinations you can visit immediately and offers a free 7-day trial which unlocks all 120 destinations for you to try. So there is definitely a lot of free experience in there. Maybe try that first?

Best,

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
I really wanted to ask you.
There are many African, Asian, and American countries that are dangerous for Europeans. I'd like to see these countries. There are people who live in Europe and often travel back home to these countries. It's not dangerous for them. You could ask them to bring a VR camera and film their own country. For example, I saw a non-European filming Kenya with a VR camera. And it was safe for them. The same could be said about Cameroon, Mali, Chad, Sudan, the Democratic Republic of Congo, Iraq, Pakistan, and Myanmar, filmed by someone who lives in these countries. Such a dangerous video would cost more than €2, but €5.
The second thing I'd like to see is: For example, you're filming Bangkok. Why don't you film four or five nearby cities separately? With one trip to Thailand, you could bring back five videos. For example, I'm from Rimini, Italy. But there are 20 very interesting cities around me. That's 20 videos.
Thank you very much for your project; I'm enjoying watching it.

developer_response.body:
Hi Impuls 1984, Thank you for the kind words and the great suggestions, So great to hear you’re enjoying TriptoVR!

We’ll definitely be adding more of those countries and places as the app continues to grow. We’ve just finished filming in India, Zanzibar, and Kuwait, and next week we’ll be shooting in Malaysia, Vietnam, Hong Kong, and the Philippines. Our goal is to add new countries every week, so the app becomes more diverse and complete over time, including the more “hard-to-reach” destinations.

That said, some countries have very strict filming regulations, and in a few places it’s not even safe for locals to film, so those locations will likely take a bit longer.

Regarding your suggestion of capturing more cities/places in one go: we do this whenever possible. However, right now our main focus is to expand overall global coverage first. In many cases, that means it’s more valuable to add major locations across multiple countries before going deeper into one specific area.

Once the overall coverage is more complete, we’ll likely shift more toward an approach where we explore particular regions in greater depth during a single trip.

Either way, we’re fully committed to continuing to grow TriptoVR in the coming years and bring you much more to enjoy!

Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description:
I am unable to travel, this app allows me to experience places I could only have dreamed of.
I found myself stood atop a mountain of dizzying heights, looking around incredible architecture and so many other wonderful experiences.
It is also quite amusing to 'people watch' tourists in the locations.
I have many left to visit and I am looking forward to seeing them all. Some, I already plan to revisit.
The tours are quite short but they have narration which is interesting and as I said, impossible for me otherwise.
I hope new locations are added.

Highly recommended!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Tutantsk, thank you for your heartwarming review and for sharing your story with us. It really hits home because making the world accessible to everyone is the core reason we started this project.

Knowing that TriptoVR helps you reach the top of mountains and explore incredible architecture that would otherwise be impossible to visit is incredibly motivating for our team. 

To answer your hope for the future: we add new destinations every single week, and with over 100 already available, you have many hours of exploration ahead of you. We continue to capture the world in high quality to ensure there are always new, wonderful dreams for you to step into.

Best, Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: This is really fun and relaxing to travel around the world.

developer_response.body:
Hi Lilian_vr,

Thank you for the support! Great to hear TriptoVR helps you to unwind! 🧘‍♀️✨

There’s something special about hopping from a bustling city to a quiet beach in seconds :-) It's our goal to make those relaxing moments feel as real as possible, so you can truly "step away" from daily life for a moment.

To keep it fresh, we’re out there every week filming a new destination for you. We wish you many more peaceful and inspiring journeys around the globe!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_title: A guided tour w/o The Walking
reviews.review_description: I have traveled and this was as good as any tour and it has a built-in tour guide it's very informative telling you a lot about the history I also took a photo and people thought I really was in Cape Town South Africa although I was at a Costco in Baltimore the day before LOL. I totally recommend
It's like Tiktok for VR, without the hateful stuff. Only beautiful views, animals, and people

developer_response.body:
Hi Gkoriski. Thank you for the support! 

Haha. that is a cool comparison! We love the idea of being the "positive" side of social media, all the discovery and beauty without the noise. And with a slower pace

Capturing those authentic views, animals, and cultures in high-quality 3D VR is exactly what we aim for. Our teams are traveling every week to find more of these unique moments so that TriptoVR always stays fresh and inspiring.

Our dream as TriptoVR is to make the world accessible to everyone in the most beautiful way possible. Thanks for being part of the journey! 🌍

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_title: I like the app just not the subscription
reviews.review_description:
I had fun going all over the world viewing places I’ve been too as well as places I want to see.
It’s a great use of VR.

Some improvements would be to allow you to turn 360 using the controllers (this would be great for people that are bed ridden but still want to explore the world virtually).

Also to allow you to zoom in (so you can read some of the dialogue on things like statues)

I assume more and more places will become available over time?

All in all it’s a great app, I would recommend downloading and trying.  However I’m giving it a 3 star simply because of the subscription.  That’s a lot to ask (12.99/mth Canadian)

So I will only do the trial period and then uninstall.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ruysty 7727,

Hi, thank you for your review! It’s great to hear that you enjoy traveling with TriptoVR and that TriptoVR has helped you revisit favorite places and discover new ones. 

We also appreciate your constructive feedback:

Controller Rotation: This is actually a high priority on our roadmap! We understand how the added value of this is for comfort and accessibility, especially for those who want to explore from a fixed position or bed. We are working on it and hope to have it implemented soon.

Zoom Function: That's an interesting idea:-) While zooming in 360° video can be technically tricky without losing quality, we are always looking for ways to improve the details and narration.

Subscription: We, as Indie developers chose this model to make TriptoVR sustainable; producing high-quality, exclusive 3D/360° content all over the world is a big and costly undertaking.  And don't forget Meta's fees and data fees :-) 

 Our subscribers are the reason we can add a brand-new destination every single week and keep the mission alive. You can cancel anytime, so if you look at it like that,   we feel it is a fair and sustainable price for the value we are providing. 

We are fully committed to making TriptoVR the most complete and high-quality VR travel experience possible. We hope you enjoy the rest of your trial, and even if you decide to move on, we're glad we could share a few journeys with you!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
I should be able to take my controllers and turn myself around through VR.  This is what I thought I’d be able to do inside of TriptoVR. if you can please update so that I can be able to sit comfortably, and look around without standing. It blocked up on me because I thought that I was traveling in a car.  Because I was trying to turn around to see what was in back of me inside VR. ( smile)￼￼￼.  I was not moving in a car. I was turning trying to turn my head so I can see around me. Thank you. If you could get the controllers to wear I can move it and just turn around and see behind me. I really appreciate it.😊


I wrote a little bit more read after (smile). Because for some reason you thinking that I was riding in a car., I was sitting in a wheelchair ’, ￼ I was trying to move my head around.  Again, thank you for fixing that. I am going to use my controller to turn myself around and see behind

I don’t wanna put it in travel mode if travel mode meant that I can put it in 360 and see all around with my control list and fine but it doesn’t please hurry up and put in a 360 I’m gonna drop it ￼￼ I just wanted you to fix it where you’d be able to turn around we don’t have to walk anywhere just turn around. You know everybody else has it what’s wrong? I’m about to let you go because I said I was just gonna give you until the seventh of the sixth, and then I’mma let you go if I can’t be able to turn around I really like your app but it’s just not comfortable having to turn my head all the time even in travel mode so I guess once you update, let me know I’ll come back on.

You guys are awesome. I love it. Thank you so much for putting that button there. That button means a lot. I’m able to turn around and see everything. ￼ and no, it’s not pictures. It’s video. I love it.🙂😉❤️￼

developer_response.body:
You are welcome!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: Keeps freezing

developer_response.body:
Hi GoofyGuppy2835,

Thank you for your feedback. Could you explain what exactly is “freezing” on your side? Are you streaming the videos? If so, you need a fast internet connection to play the 6K stream smoothly. Otherwise it is better to download the HQ versions, this will give you steady playback.

If you are not streaming, we would really like to hear more about the issue you are experiencing so we can look into it and try to fix it. Please contact us at info@triptovr.com

As for the price: you can try two episodes for free, and we also offer a free trial that gives you access to all the content. To make TriptoVR sustainable and keep adding a new trip every week, we have chosen this price, which we feel is reasonable. Creating these travel experiences takes a lot of time and is expensive, so the subscription helps us continue producing new content and expanding the library or our subscribers.

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
I have Crohn’s disease with a lot of Trauma, Anxiety & PTSD.  For 2 years TRIPP has helped me understand my pain, calm my central nervous system & is a huge relief for my anxiety.  
TRIPP continues to play a huge part in how I live and think.  
I realise I am more than all the bad things that have happened to me. 
I am 62, we are never too old to learn new things, change direction and help make the world a better place. 

Due to being unwell my whole life I have never been able to travel until discovering TripToVr.  The ability to be able to travel in such an immersive way without leaving home is just incredible.

developer_response.body:
Hi Les, thank you for sharing your story with us. It’s amazing to hear how TriptoVR is helping you discover the world in new ways. Our core focus is to make travel experiences possible for everyone, so your story is really fitting, and you can expect us to keep bringing more of the world to your doorstep. Coming up are Los Angeles, the Grand Canyon, Western Australia, Indonesia, Kuwait, and many more.

Thank you for your support!
Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: Get a meta quste
I love it, would be better if we can go inside of the buildings. A trip to New York within seconds, love it!
I’ll never have enough money to travel to these places but this is close to it.  Thank you for this experience!  Can I just pay a discounted annual rate instead of monthly?  Best travel vr app!

If you are used to 4k hdr 2d content, you will be disappointed. I still wonder why the heck I cant find a decent 3d video anywhere. Games are crispy sharp, especially when used with game optimizer. Hence the quest 3 vr set is not the bottleneck. I researched the situation and apparently the vr cameras nowadays are just not on par with what the headset can actually deliver. So I guess the creators of trip.vr are not to blame. So to my taste those vr trips are blurry as hell. I watched quite a few of them though and just to get an idea what this or that city has to offer I guess its fine. And the potential for such vr trips is very high. We r just not there yet. Hence I cant say the price/subscription is justified, should be way cheaper. I would still recommend trying it out - maybe you are not such an uhd junky as me.

developer_response.body:
Hi Zendalex,

Thank you for your support and for sharing your feedback!

Running a game is actually much less demanding for a Meta Quest than playing a 6K 3D 360° video. Games are rendered in real time, while our videos are pre-recorded in extremely high resolution, which makes them much heavier on both the GPU and CPU.

In fact, we capture our footage in a bit higher quality than what you currently see in the app. The main limitation at the moment is the hardware of the Meta Quest itself , it’s not yet capable of playing these videos at their full recorded quality.

Another important factor is whether you are streaming or downloading. When streaming, the quality depends on your internet connection. If the connection is weaker, the app automatically lowers the quality to keep playback smooth. When you download an episode, you get a consistently high and stable quality. So for the most stable and constant quality we recommend downloading an episode..

As streaming technology and hardware continue to improve, we plan to further enhance the visual quality.

Regarding the subscription price: producing these experiences requires a significant investment. We release new content every week, and costs include production, development, infrastructure, data, and Meta’s platform fees. Taking all of this into account, we believe the current pricing reflects a fair value for an ongoing, high-quality travel experience. Lower pricing would unfortunately make the model unsustainable.

We hope this helps clarify things, and thank you for traveling with us!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: Where's  Jamaica,  or new Zealand  ?

Hi Teddy,

Thank you for your feedback!

TriptoVR is continuously expanding to more countries and destinations around the world. Every week we add a new location, and over time places like New Zealand and Jamaica will be added as well.

Recording and producing these experiences takes a lot of time and work, so it’s an ongoing process. But the world inside TriptoVR keeps growing every week, so keep an eye on us and you’ll see more and more spots appear on the globe!

reviews.review_title: Great App BUT we need more locations

I wish they offered more real locations like the African one where the lions come right up to you. it would be nice to have boat rides to see whales , sharks ext. Took the trial and manged to see very location in 2 days

developer_response.body:
Hi Liam,

Hi, thank you for your feedback and for the support! It’s great to hear that you are enjoying TriptoVR!

We are definitely working on adding many more locations, and up-close nature and wildlife encounters will be part of it. We currently add a new destination every single week and are fully committed to expanding this "travel machine" to include more iconic natural wonders and unique cultural spots from all over the world.

Our mission is to provide high-quality, exclusive travel experiences that aren't available anywhere else. While it takes time to film and produce these unique journeys, we are dedicated to building the most complete VR travel ecosystem possible.

We’ve got many more surprising destinations and immersive experiences lined up for the coming months, so stay tuned!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_title: I like it but I want MORE!
reviews.review_description:
Most of the videos are excellent quality, as long as my streaming is robust. But i have occasional issues when I download—the app sometimes quits or won’t play the downloaded content. It’s also a pain to have to scroll through the location panels every time—a list or ability to type a few letters to get there quicker would be nice.  A search function with some metadata would be awesome.

But my major complaint is there is just not “enough” included in the tour. It’s basically a “tease” but not fully satisfying. 7 to 12 minutes isn’t much of an experience, if you are hoping to use Trip to VR to replace travel, you will be very disappointed. For instance, I just streamed the Las Vegas experience. We were on a street where you could see the spectacular Sphere at The Venetian Resort at the end of the street. However there was no mention of it, and it wasn’t shown again—one of the most spectacular features in the newer Vegas attractions! This was similar in other locations—talk about the fantastic fountains, but no visuals of them. I find I am just going somewhere else to search for more content, when I find somewhere I felt was under represented. In that case, I could do that without the app. I heard they upgrade more regularly than other travel apps, so I will continue to subscribe for a few months to see if the developer continues to build out and enhance the app. I’m hoping they are able to, since travel is going to be even more difficult in the near future.

developer_response.body:
Hi KarynL,

Thank you for your support and feedback!

Regarding your suggestion: we are planning a major UX update later this year and will definitely take your ideas into account.

At the moment, we’re focused on adding more destinations to the globe,  we upload a new one every week. In the future, we also plan to create more in-depth travel experiences and expand some of the existing destinations.

So stay with us, and we’ll make sure you get to see plenty more of our beautiful world! 🌍

Best,
Team TriptoVR

Thank you for your support! We love hearing that TriptoVR gave you such a beautiful first VR experience. That feeling of truly being there is exactly what we aim to create. We add new experiences every week, so you can continue to enjoy fresh adventures for a long time to come.

Thanks again for sharing your experience with us!

Best, Team TriptoVR

developer_response.body:
Hi Lordjimofbrum,

Thanks for your feedback and for recommending the app to those who can afford it :-)

Producing our content is quite an undertaking. Creating these unique journeys is costly, think of the travel expenses, the time our teams spend on-site, and the professional 360° 3D production required for each location. Additionally, there are ongoing costs for app development, maintenance, and data hosting.

Our dream as TriptoVR is to make the world accessible to everyone, and a fee is necessary to maintain this growing ecosystem and keep adding new locations every single week. It simply would not be possible without it. To see the full value of what we offer, we suggest trying our 7-day free trial, which instantly unlocks all 100+ professional destinations.

Best,
Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
First of all it is glitching so much, that it turns my meta quest 3 controller into a controller of a whole different VR gadget, and it cannot read my space well, I had to quit and re-open a few times. The download promises HD quality, for me it was no different from the streaming. The picture quality was really extremely blury for me, to the point it took a lot of my joy- and to top it off I waited 20-30 minutes for a download. Depending on destination the camera view can be better or worse. The new york session almost destroyed my eyes because the porportions of the frame wasn't proper. Would have given 5 stars if there were no glitches and the video quality was sharp and crisp.

Reply to Teams Answer: Thank you for your answer.  Let me put it this way, the immersive real footage experience of other apps is much better on the eyes, less blurry on my quest. Since other apps are working just fine for me, i dont think its my headset.

developer_response.body:
Hi Seda,

Thank you for your feedback.

A major update is coming soon, featuring a completely redesigned UX foundation that should make the overall experience much smoother and more intuitive.

That said, we haven't received reports of this specific issue before, so we'd like to investigate it further and understand the underlying cause. It could potentially be headset-specific. Have you updated your headset recently? Hopefully the upcoming UX update will resolve the issue as well, but we'll certainly look into it.

Regarding video quality, approximately 98% of our videos are available in stereo 6K x 6K 360° 3D, which is generally considered the highest resolution the Quest can reliably play. We are continuously working on improving both streaming and download quality to push the experience even further.

It's worth noting that 360° video will always appear somewhat less sharp than traditional flat video because the same number of pixels must cover a much larger field of view. The trade-off is the immersive feeling of being present in the location. Recently, we have improved our streaming quality significantly, bringing it much closer to download quality, and we are planning to increase download quality even further in an upcoming update.

Regarding download speeds, that's interesting feedback as well. With a fast internet connection, downloads should generally complete fairly quickly, although some of our videos can be as large as 8 GB. Could you tell us where you were downloading from and what kind of internet connection you were using? That information would help us better understand what might be causing the issue.

Thank you again for your support and for helping us improve TriptoVR.

Best regards,

The TriptoVR Team

reviews.review_title: VR videos of world class cities
reviews.review_description:
I love the one free video of Italy 🇮🇹 however there should be alot more free videos than just one of Venice. 

Also,  charging $10 a month $120 annually is not worth it as these are available in YouTube 360 for free.

developer_response.body:
Thank you R7pture for your feedback. Great to hear you are enjoyed Venice. Let us explain our pricing. First of all, what is important to mention is that you can try two episodes for free, and we also offer a 7-day free trial. This way, everyone gets a fair chance to experience and enjoy the app for free. 

Second all our videos are not available for free on Youtube. All our destinations are produced by us and are unique and of high quality. With around 100+ destinations and with new destinations being added every week, we are essentially building a travel machine for everyone who wants to experience more of the world but can’t do it all in real life. That is what TriptoVR is all about. 

It’s also worth noting that creating high-quality content, covering data and streaming costs, maintaining the app, and Meta’s platform fees all involve significant expenses. 

To keep improving the app and continue adding new destinations every week, we do need to charge such a fee. We believe the 9.99 option is a fair price for unlimited access to all these amazing destinations on planet earth, and this is reflected in the overall positive response from our subscribers.  And you can ofcourse opt out whenever you want

We are passionate indie developers and 360° filmmakers who love travel and dream of making travel experiences accessible to everyone. It’s incredibly motivating to see how much value the app already brings to so many people and how strongly it resonates. However, without revenue, we simply wouldn’t be able to keep building and creating. That’s why we’re truly grateful to our subscribers and purchasers. With their support, we believe we can make this dream a reality.

I hope this helps explain why we’ve chosen this pricing model.  :-)

Best, Team TriptoVR

Hi Eu66,  thank you for your feedback and great to hear you are enjoying the content of TriptoVR.

We are working hard to expand our global variety. We are currently adding a new destination every week, including more locations across Asia, Africa, and the Americas, to make the map as diverse as possible.

reviews.review_title: Most Relaxing, Hands-Free VR Travel App
reviews.review_description:
I am so impressed with this app! Each location on the map has an immersive documentary with beautiful imagery, and most importantly--MOTION. 

Many of the other VR Travel apps are static--you move around within the world. With TriptoVR, the world moves around YOU. 

It's mostly hands-free once you press play. So, just sit back, relax, and enjoy your trip. I have especially enjoyed watching the local people, not just the landscape and architecture. It truly feels like you're a part of the scene. 

My husband and I both have headsets, so we press play at the same time and chat while we watch. My only request would be to offer a family subscription, so we can use both headsets without 2 separate subscriptions. 

Can't wait to see what locations come next. Great job, guys. We see you traveling along with us in many of the cities managing the camera. What an incredible project this must have been.

developer_response.body:
Wow, Mrs Gold, it’s so heartwarming to hear your story 😊 and how lovely that you and your husband are enjoying TriptoVR together💕. It makes us even more motivated to keep adding new and even more amazing destinations to the app. We’ll also think about ways to make it an even more shared experience.

Thank you for your support, and stay tuned for many more travel adventures!

Best,
Team TriptoVR

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description:
I see that the subscription is $9.99 per month. I’d like to know whether the limited number of destinations I can currently see is because I am on a free trial.
If I subscribe, will I be able to access more destinations? What is the main difference between the free trial and the paid subscription?

Feedback:
The destinations look great visually, but the introductions are very short. There are no subtitles and no other language options, which makes it less convenient to use. In

developer_response.body:
Hi Aixinone,

Thank you for your feedback. Yes, you’ll be able to access all destinations. At the moment, there are around 100 destinations available, and we’re adding new ones every week. The free trial gives you full access for 7 days, so you can really try it out.

Regarding the language options: you can switch languages via the audio button. Currently, English, Spanish, and French are supported. At the beginning of February, we’ll be adding German. You can also change the app language through the language menu at the top of the destination menu. We’ll review this and see how we can make it clearer for all users.

Thank you, and best!

Team TriptoVR

reviews.review_description: My mistake, I commented on the wrong app trip to VR is an amazing app, one of my favorite things about VR is viewing the world since I will obviously never have the money to do so so the closest I can get to visiting these beautiful places is in virtual reality and the graphics are amazing looking forward to more places in the future. my compliments to the team, photographers and the artists who compile all this beautiful information and make it all so wonderful a wonderful must have app thank you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your support, Ruguitar, great to hear you’re enjoying TriptoVR so much! Expect many more destinations and amazing places to relax in 2026.

Wishing you all the best,
Team TriptoVR

developer_response.body:
Hi Navin1234,

Thank you so much for the support! It is wonderful to hear that you are finding TriptoVR fun, beautiful, and educational, that is exactly the balance we strive for with every destination we produce.

We are adding a new destination to the globe every week, so there is always something new for you to learn about and explore. Stay tuned for many more travel adventures!

Best,
Team TriptoVR
